## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Datagrid and GrowthX to discuss content progress, performance metrics, and upcoming SOW discussions.](https://fathom.video/share/_dTpTEk4qns19g94ijThsNoDTYyDCDyL?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production on track: 805 articles live by Saturday](https://fathom.video/share/_dTpTEk4qns19g94ijThsNoDTYyDCDyL?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
  - [Traffic holding steady; branded traffic at new highs](https://fathom.video/share/_dTpTEk4qns19g94ijThsNoDTYyDCDyL?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [New content clusters (real estate, manufacturing, government agencies, mining) showing promising traffic growth](https://fathom.video/share/_dTpTEk4qns19g94ijThsNoDTYyDCDyL?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
  - [SOW discussions scheduled for September 10th](https://fathom.video/share/_dTpTEk4qns19g94ijThsNoDTYyDCDyL?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Update

  - [805 articles to be live by Saturday](https://fathom.video/share/_dTpTEk4qns19g94ijThsNoDTYyDCDyL?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
  - [No production hiccups reported](https://fathom.video/share/_dTpTEk4qns19g94ijThsNoDTYyDCDyL?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
  - [New SOW discussions scheduled for September 10th](https://fathom.video/share/_dTpTEk4qns19g94ijThsNoDTYyDCDyL?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)

### Performance Metrics

  - [Overall traffic stable in recent weeks](https://fathom.video/share/_dTpTEk4qns19g94ijThsNoDTYyDCDyL?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [Google traffic steady; LLM traffic slightly volatile](https://fathom.video/share/_dTpTEk4qns19g94ijThsNoDTYyDCDyL?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [Branded traffic reaching new highs](https://fathom.video/share/_dTpTEk4qns19g94ijThsNoDTYyDCDyL?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
  - Ranking \#1 for 127 non-branded keywords on Google

### Content Cluster Performance

  - [New clusters showing positive results:](https://fathom.video/share/_dTpTEk4qns19g94ijThsNoDTYyDCDyL?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
      - [Real estate, manufacturing, government agencies, and mining saw traffic jumps](https://fathom.video/share/_dTpTEk4qns19g94ijThsNoDTYyDCDyL?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
      - [Mining cluster targeting heavy industry performing well](https://fathom.video/share/_dTpTEk4qns19g94ijThsNoDTYyDCDyL?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
  - [Some older clusters underperforming](https://fathom.video/share/_dTpTEk4qns19g94ijThsNoDTYyDCDyL?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
      - [Attributed to lack of content refreshing and pruning](https://fathom.video/share/_dTpTEk4qns19g94ijThsNoDTYyDCDyL?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
      - [Plan to address with new SOW implementation](https://fathom.video/share/_dTpTEk4qns19g94ijThsNoDTYyDCDyL?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)

### LLM Traffic Insights

  - [Overall LLM traffic decreased slightly](https://fathom.video/share/_dTpTEk4qns19g94ijThsNoDTYyDCDyL?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
  - [Gemini referrals dried up this week](https://fathom.video/share/_dTpTEk4qns19g94ijThsNoDTYyDCDyL?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
  - [GPT remains primary LLM referral source](https://fathom.video/share/_dTpTEk4qns19g94ijThsNoDTYyDCDyL?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [Statistics blogs performing well in LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/_dTpTEk4qns19g94ijThsNoDTYyDCDyL?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
      - [Building brand awareness, not conversion-oriented](https://fathom.video/share/_dTpTEk4qns19g94ijThsNoDTYyDCDyL?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)

### Link Building

  - [Slight delay from external partners](https://fathom.video/share/_dTpTEk4qns19g94ijThsNoDTYyDCDyL?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
  - [Links reportedly built; update expected next week](https://fathom.video/share/_dTpTEk4qns19g94ijThsNoDTYyDCDyL?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Await link building update next week](https://fathom.video/share/_dTpTEk4qns19g94ijThsNoDTYyDCDyL?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
  - [Prepare for SOW discussion on September 10th](https://fathom.video/share/_dTpTEk4qns19g94ijThsNoDTYyDCDyL?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
  - [Plan content refresh and pruning strategy for underperforming clusters](https://fathom.video/share/_dTpTEk4qns19g94ijThsNoDTYyDCDyL?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
  - [Monitor performance of new content clusters (real estate, manufacturing, government agencies, mining)](https://fathom.video/share/_dTpTEk4qns19g94ijThsNoDTYyDCDyL?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
  - [Continue leveraging statistics blogs for LLM visibility and brand awareness](https://fathom.video/share/_dTpTEk4qns19g94ijThsNoDTYyDCDyL?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
